title: Egyptian Milk Mousse Radiant Delight
description: A creamy and light dessert that combines the richness of milk with the elegance of radiant and egyptian ingredients. Perfect for a sweet indulgence.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine milk and egyptian. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture simmers.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it steep for 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl. Discard the solids.
Whip 1/2 cup heavy cream until stiff peaks form. Fold the whipped cream into the milk mixture until well combined.
If using radiant, fold it gently into the mixture. Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled and set.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional radiant if desired.
